sections.paragraph:
κισσάω 1 aor. ἐκίσσησα crave (Aristoph. et al.; also Just., D. 58, 4 [for ἐγκισσάω Gen 31:10]; of the cravings of pregnant women for strange food Aristot. et al.); become pregnant with τινά someone 1 Cl 18:5 (Ps 50:7).—DELG s.v. 2 κίσσα.

aor. aor. = aorist

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 545
